name: KAMA RSI Adaptive Pullback
edge_hypothesis: KAMA's adaptivity is a proven edge mechanism (KAMA Stoch v1 PF=1.857). This spec tests whether the edge comes from KAMA itself or from its specific pairing with Stochastic. By replacing Stochastic with RSI as confirmation, we isolate KAMA's contribution. RSI pullback recovery (crossing above 40 from below) catches entries after a dip in a KAMA-confirmed uptrend — a classic 'buy the dip' pattern but with an adaptive baseline that automatically tightens in ranges and loosens in trends. If KAMA+RSI performs similarly to KAMA+Stoch, KAMA's adaptivity IS the edge. If it underperforms, the Stochastic pairing contributes unique timing value.

variants.name: kama_rsi_v1_pullback40_8to1
variants.description: Core thesis: KAMA trend + RSI pullback recovery at 40. 8:1 R:R. RSI crossing 40 from below = moderate oversold recovery in KAMA-confirmed trend.

components.notes: Kaufman Adaptive MA. Fast in trends, slow in ranges. Price above KAMA = adaptive uptrend.
RSI crosses above 40 = recovery from pullback. Not deep oversold, but enough to catch early re-entries.
ATR-based position sizing and R:R framework.

variants.name: kama_rsi_v2_deep30_10to1
variants.description: Deeper pullback: RSI crosses above 30 (classic oversold recovery). Fewer entries but higher-conviction. 10:1 R:R compensates for reduced frequency. Tests if waiting for deeper dips in KAMA trends improves hit rate.

components.notes: RSI crosses above 30 = deep oversold recovery. Higher-conviction entries.

variants.name: kama_rsi_v3_momentum50_8to1
variants.description: Momentum confirmation: RSI crosses above 50 (neutral to bullish). Not a pullback play — this catches KAMA trend + RSI momentum alignment. Tests whether momentum confirmation or pullback recovery is the better pairing with KAMA.

components.notes: RSI crosses 50 = momentum alignment, not pullback. Tests momentum vs mean-reversion pairing with KAMA.

indicator_roles.baseline: KAMA_10_2_30 — Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average. Speed adapts to market efficiency: fast in trends, slow in noise. Proven edge mechanism (KAMA Stoch v1 PF=1.857).
indicator_roles.confirmation: RSI_14 — Relative Strength Index. Three variants test pullback recovery (40), deep oversold recovery (30), and momentum alignment (50).
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework.
